endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/{name}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v1/{name}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}:iapSettings
endpoints.description: Gets the IAP settings on a particular IAP protected resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v1/{name}:iapSettings
endpoints.description: Updates the IAP settings on a particular IAP protected resource. It replaces all fields unless the `update_mask` is set.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}:resetSecret
endpoints.description: Resets an Identity Aware Proxy (IAP) OAuth client secret. Useful if the secret was compromised. Requires that the client is owned by IAP.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/brands
endpoints.description: Lists the existing brands for the project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/brands
endpoints.description: Constructs a new OAuth brand for the project if one does not exist. The created brand is "internal only", meaning that OAuth clients created under it only accept requests from users who belong to the same Google Workspace organization as the project. The brand is created in an un-reviewed status. NOTE: The "internal only" status can be manually changed in the Google Cloud Console. Requires that a brand does not already exist for the project, and that the specified support email is owned by the caller.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/destGroups
endpoints.description: Lists the existing TunnelDestGroups. To group across all locations, use a `-` as the location ID. For example: `/v1/projects/123/iap_tunnel/locations/-/destGroups`
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/destGroups
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/identityAwareProxyClients
endpoints.description: Lists the existing clients for the brand.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/identityAwareProxyClients
endpoints.description: Creates an Identity Aware Proxy (IAP) OAuth client. The client is owned by IAP. Requires that the brand for the project exists and that it is set for internal-only use.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{resource}:getIamPolicy
endpoints.description: Gets the access control policy for an Identity-Aware Proxy protected resource. More information about managing access via IAP can be found at: https://cloud.google.com/iap/docs/managing-access#managing_access_via_the_api
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCE}} with a real resource.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{resource}:setIamPolicy
endpoints.description: Sets the access control policy for an Identity-Aware Proxy protected resource. Replaces any existing policy. More information about managing access via IAP can be found at: https://cloud.google.com/iap/docs/managing-access#managing_access_via_the_api
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCE}} with a real resource.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{resource}:testIamPermissions
endpoints.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the Identity-Aware Proxy protected resource. More information about managing access via IAP can be found at: https://cloud.google.com/iap/docs/managing-access#managing_access_via_the_api
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCE}} with a real resource.
